news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) is experiencing a Death Cross, a bearish signal where the 50-day SMA falls below the 200-day SMA. This indicator often signifies bearish momentum in the stock market. Despite this development, experts suggest caution before shorting Coinbase’s stock, pointing out that there is more to consider. The technical setup of COIN is causing speculation among investors – is it bearish or oversold? Analysts predict limited upside potential given the current market drawdown. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Coinbase stock (NASDAQ: COIN) hits dreaded Death Cross as 50-day SMA falls below 200-day SMA, signaling bearish momentum.
Latest update: 150 new cases reported, total now at 5,000. Public advised to stay home to curb spread of COVID-19.
US credit risk gauge pares widening after the Employment report.

news.summary: Introducing the future of essential communications in Burnsville, Minnesota on April 4, 2025, RTS Intercom Systems unveils two innovative products that will revolutionize professional communication. The company proudly introduces the NOMAD Wireless Intercom and the RVOC Hybrid Cloud, aimed at enhancing communication in various industries.
news.headline: RTS introduces NOMAD Wireless Intercom & RVOC Hybrid Cloud solution at NAB 2025, revolutionizing professional communication.

news.summary: Dr. Megan Simpson, DDS has recently joined the esteemed team of dental professionals at Crabapple Dental. Her addition has elevated the practice's level of expertise, thanks to her extensive academic background and practical experience. The announcement was made on April 4 in ALPHARETTA, Ga.
news.headline: Dr. Megan Simpson, DDS, has joined Crabapple Dental's team in Alpharetta, GA, adding expertise and experience.
Traders continue to bet on 4 Fed rate cuts by the end of the year.

news.summary: Radius Recycling, Inc. reported results for the second quarter of fiscal 2025 with a loss per share from continuing operations of $(1.15) and a net loss of $(33) million. Adjusted EBITDA was approximately break-even in this quarter. Despite lower global ferrous and finished steel prices, there was a 12% increase in ferrous sales volumes and a 10% increase in nonferrous demand. The quarter also saw a $3 million gain from the Company's asset monetization program. The company generated positive operating cash flow of $20 million and free cash flow of $13 million. Total debt was $430 million with capital expenditures of $11 million. The Company declared a cash dividend of $0.1875 per common share and is in the process of merging with Toyota Tsusho America, expected to close in the second half of 2025. The Board of Directors also approved the Merger Agreement. The Company remains a leading North American recycler of metals with operations in 25 states, Puerto Rico, and Western Canada.
news.headline: Radius Recycling reported Q2 fiscal 2025 results with a net loss of $33 million, revenues at $643 million, and higher ferrous sales volumes up 12%. Initiatives drove a 12% reduction in SG&A costs, generating positive operating cash flow of $20 million and free cash flow of $13 million. The Board declared a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share and a merger with Toyota Tsusho America, Inc. is underway.

news.summary: SiteOne Landscape Supply, Inc. (NYSE: SITE) has recently acquired Green Trade Nursery of Georgia, a wholesale distributor located in Jasper, Georgia, situated north of Atlanta. The acquisition marks an important expansion for SiteOne, as Green Trade is well-known for its high-quality nursery products and top-notch customer service in the North Atlanta market. This strategic move reflects SiteOne's commitment to growth and further solidifies its presence in the industry.
news.headline: SiteOne Landscape Supply (NYSE: SITE) acquires Green Trade Nursery in Georgia, expanding its presence with one location in Jasper and enhancing its market reach in North Atlanta.

news.summary: The drone detection market is projected to increase from USD 659.4 million in 2024 to USD 2,329.9 million by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 28.7%. This growth is attributed to the rising number of illegal drone operations that pose security threats to critical infrastructure, airports, military installations, and public areas. Traditional security systems struggle to detect these unauthorized drones due to their small size, low altitude, and high maneuverability. As a result, specialized detection technologies are essential for identifying and mitigating the risks associated with drones. The market is led by companies such as Lockheed Martin Corporation, RTX, Northrop Grumman, Teledyne FLIR LLC, and Elbit Systems Ltd. The military and defense sector is expected to dominate the drone detection market due to the increasing use of drones in modern warfare and security operations, prompting armed forces globally to invest significantly in drone detection and counter-drone technologies.
news.headline: Drone Detection Market to reach $2,329.9 million by 2029 with a CAGR of 28.7%. Growing concerns over illegal drone operations drive demand for technology. Major players include Lockheed Martin, RTX, Northrop Grumman, Teledyne FLIR LLC, and Elbit Systems Ltd. Military & defense segment leads the market due to the rising threat of UAVs in security operations.

news.summary: China has implemented a 34% tariff on all products brought in from the U.S., effective from April 10. This move is a response to the U.S. administration's introduction of tariffs previously. The Chinese finance ministry has urged the U.S. to retract its one-sided tariff actions and settle trade disputes through fair discussion for mutual benefit. Criticizing the U.S., the ministry highlighted that these tactics go against global trade regulations, damage China's lawful rights, and amount to oppressive behavior. Beijing labeled the 54% U.S. tariffs on China as not aligning with international trade standards.
news.headline: China imposes 34% tariff on all US imports starting April 10 in retaliation, urges Trump to cancel tariffs and negotiate fairly.
Traders pare bets on Fed rate cut by May after jobs report, June seen as likely start.

news.summary: In May 2025, renowned American concert pianist Peter Simon is set to commence a unique tour of Israel, providing complimentary performances in several towns throughout the nation. Simon, known for his exceptional talent and heartfelt performances, aims to share the healing influence of music with the Israeli populace during this tour.
news.headline: Renowned American pianist Peter Simon to tour Israel in May 2025, providing free concerts in multiple communities.

This powerful transformation heightened her reverence for the natural world and the inherent strength present in every person. This experience motivated her to...

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Vision Films Inc. revealed the upcoming North American VOD launch of H2O: The Intelligence of Water set for April 8, 2025. This documentary by filmmaker Emmanuel Itier and Wonderland Entertainment Group will be available for streaming on the same day across the region.
news.headline: Vision Films to release documentary on water intelligence by Emmanuel Itier on April 8, 2025 in North America.

news.summary: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: XENE) based in Vancouver, British Columbia and Boston has revealed their participation in the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting (AAN 2025) in San Diego, CA from April 5-9, 2025. The biopharmaceutical company will present three posters at the event. This includes sharing long-term data from the X-TOLE open-label extension (OLE) study of azetukalner in patients with focal onset seizures (FOS). Additionally, an exploratory efficacy analysis of FOS seizure subtypes from the X-TOLE study will be presented, along with patient survey findings on the mental health and comorbidity burdens of FOS.
news.headline: Xenon will present 36-month data on azetukalner at AAN 2025, including findings from FOS study.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Vimeo (NASDAQ: VMEO) unveiled Vimeo Streaming, a new platform revolutionizing content delivery and monetization. Creators can now launch their own streaming services and branded apps to reach global audiences. This release includes enhanced monetization options, advanced analytics, increased content protection, and access to innovative multilingual AI services. Vimeo aims to empower creators of all sizes with cutting-edge tools for delivering superior viewing experiences.
news.headline: Vimeo launches 'Vimeo Streaming', offering creators of all sizes new monetization options, analytics, protection, and AI services.

news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota on April 04, 2025, NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation (Nasdaq: NMTC) revealed that it priced an underwritten registered public offering of 16,000,000 common stock shares at $0.50 per share. The company, focused on enhancing surgical care for patients with neurological disorders, made the announcement.
news.headline: NeuroOne Medical Tech sells 16M shares at $0.50/share in $8.0M public offering. Company focuses on neurological disorder treatments.

news.summary: London-based Arqit Quantum Inc., a prominent player in quantum-safe encryption, has disclosed initial financial figures for the first half of fiscal year 2025. The company shared this update on April 4, 2025, indicating a positive stride in their financial performance.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Viz.ai, a pioneer in AI-driven disease identification and smart care coordination, was revealed as a recipient of the 2025 Edison Awards for the third consecutive year. The company's AI software, Viz HCM, which is tailored to identify and prioritize individuals displaying indications of hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM), was acknowledged in the Health Medical & Biotech division and the Cardiovascular Health Diagnostics and Monitoring segment. This recognition marks Viz.ai's consistent excellence in the field.
news.headline: Viz.ai wins 2025 Edison Award™ for Machine Learning Innovation for the Third Consecutive Year in healthcare technology.

The company, listed as NASDAQ: SPPL, is a renowned technology firm specializing in facilities management solutions. This contract highlights SIMPPLE's position as a key player in the FM sector, emphasizing its commitment to innovation and efficiency in service delivery.
news.headline: SIMPPLE Ltd. secures $524,000 contract for autonomous cleaning robots at Singapore Airport Terminal.

news.summary: A partnership between Avelo Airlines and Michigan Flyer has been announced, marking a noteworthy collaboration for travelers. The news highlights the launch of low one-way fares starting at $39 for flights between DTW and HVN. Avelo Airlines initiated its flight services from DTW to Tweed New Haven Airport in Southern Connecticut on April 4, 2025. This partnership is expected to bring an affordable travel option for passengers, with competitive pricing to enhance connectivity between the mentioned airports.
news.headline: Avelo Airlines launches new route from Detroit to New Haven, CT, with low fares starting at $39.

Starwood Capital Group is renowned for its global presence and investments, while Land Strategies Management focuses on strategic land management. This partnership signifies a significant move in the real estate market, showcasing the pooled resources and expertise of both entities.

news.summary: New York - In an innovative approach to cancer patient care, a new homeopathic remedy called ENCER has been introduced. This remedy aims to alleviate the fatigue experienced by cancer patients undergoing treatment. Launched in April 2025, ENCER offers a holistic approach by specifically targeting the fatigue that commonly accompanies cancer treatment. This groundbreaking remedy addresses the needs of patients by providing relief and improving their quality of life during this challenging time.

news.summary: Prime Roots, a cutting-edge deli brand, is making waves in Toronto with its innovative mycelium-based deli meats, targeting a new wave of consumers. Catering to the increasing demand for plant-based options, Prime Roots has officially debuted in Canada, introducing the country's first mycelium-based deli products. These offerings, which are allergen-free and minimally processed, are proving to be a viable option for foodservice providers seeking operational ease while capitalizing on the plant-based trend. Notably, 35% of Canadians identify as flexitarians, underscoring the significant market potential for Prime Roots' unique offerings.
news.headline: Prime Roots debuts in Canada with mycelium-based deli meats, catering to the growing plant-based demand with allergen-free products. 35% of Canadians are flexitarians.

news.summary: Following the market's biggest losses since 2020, futures plummeted as China retaliated against Trump tariffs, sparking fears of a recession. The Dow Jones Futures took a nosedive in response to this development. Investors are closely monitoring the upcoming jobs report and statements from Powell for further insights.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures plunge after China retaliates against Trump tariffs, raising recession fears. Market saw worst losses since 2020.

news.summary: Dublin, - A report on the Home Energy Management System Market predicts significant growth, estimating it to reach US$14 billion by 2033, a substantial increase from US$3.76 billion in 2024. The market is projected to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.71% from 2025 to 2033. Factors contributing to this growth include a worldwide focus on energy efficiency, the rising popularity of smart homes and Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, and governmental initiatives promoting sustainable living practices.
news.headline: Home Energy Management Systems market set to reach $14 billion by 2033 from $3.76 billion in 2024, with a 15.71% CAGR.

news.summary: Following the recent decision by the HHS to terminate thousands of employees, Pfizer stock is being scrutinized whether it is a good investment choice. The mass firings have caused uncertainty in the process of approving new drugs. The impact of this move along with the tariffs imposed has raised concerns within the pharmaceutical industry. Investors are now questioning if it is the right time to sell Pfizer stock given these recent events.
news.headline: Pfizer may face challenges as HHS layoffs impact drug approvals, raising concerns over stock performance.

news.summary: Following the resignation of Peter Marks from the FDA, Moderna stock, along with other vaccine manufacturers, is experiencing a downturn. With concerns over the impact of massive job cuts on U.S. health agencies, investors are questioning whether it is time to sell MRNA stock. This news has put pressure on the stock prices of companies in the vaccine sector as uncertainty looms.
news.headline: Moderna stock under pressure as Peter Marks resigns from FDA. Massive job cuts in U.S. health agencies. Is MRNA stock a sell?

news.summary: At 11:25 a.m., Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell will provide insights on the impact of Trump's tariffs on the economic forecast. The focus on Powell's perspective has relegated the jobs report to a secondary role in current coverage. This development was reported live by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Fed Chair Powell to discuss impact of Trump tariffs at 11:25 a.m. Jobs report overlooked in live coverage.

news.summary: Entourage Health Corp. has successfully completed a plan of arrangement where 1001095275 Ontario Inc., a related party of LiUNA Pension Fund of Central and Eastern Canada, acquired all issued common shares of the company for C$0.005 per share, totaling $1. With an effective date of March 31, 2025, this transaction has been finalized to the satisfaction of Entourage Health Corp. The news was announced on April 04, 2025.
news.headline: Entourage Health Corp. completes acquisition by 1001095275 Ontario Inc. linked with LiUNA, exchanging common shares for C$0.005 each.
